install_cmds: sed -i 's/rich==9.13.0/rich>=13.0/' requirements.txt && pip install 'httpx<0.28' && pip install -r requirements.txt

mkdir -p /opt/chatdev-macnet-data && python3 -c "import urllib.request, gzip, shutil; urllib.request.urlretrieve('https://github.com/openai/human-eval/raw/master/data/HumanEval.jsonl.gz', '/tmp/he.gz'); f_in=gzip.open('/tmp/he.gz','rb'); f_out=open('/opt/chatdev-macnet-data/HumanEval.jsonl','wb'); shutil.copyfileobj(f_in,f_out)"
